'''√w-ch-s''' ('''kawachas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curtsey|curtsey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curtsey|curtsey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-ch-s
|-
! Lemma
| kawachas
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiwachas || jiwachas || shiwachas || kiwachas
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuwachas || jujuwachas || shushuwachas || kukuwachas
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuwachas || juwachas || shuwachas || kuwachas
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuwachas || juwachas || shuwachas || kuwachas
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thewachas || jewachas || shewachas || kewachas
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothowachas || jojowachas || shoshowachas || kokowachas
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thowachas || jowachas || showachas || kowachas
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thowachas || jowachas || showachas || kowachas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || wachas || wachas || wachas || wachas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || wachas || wachas || wachas || wachas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || wachas || wachas || wachas || wachas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || wachas || wachas || wachas || wachas
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæwachas || jæwachas || shæwachas || kæwachas
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathawachas || jajawachas || shashawachas || kakawachas
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thawachas || jawachas || shawachas || kawachas
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thawachas || jawachas || shawachas || kawachas
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shawachas
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshawachas
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishawachas
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shawachasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshawachasnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishawachasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shawachasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshawachasnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishawachasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shawachasro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshawachasnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishawachasro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shawachasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshawachasnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishawachasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shawachassher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshawachasnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishawachassher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shawachasng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshawachasnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishawachasng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shawachasya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshawachasnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishawachasya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shawachasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshawachasnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishawachasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shawachasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshawachasnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishawachasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shawachasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawachasnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawachasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shawachasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshawachasnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawachasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shawachasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshawachasnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishawachasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shawachasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawachasnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawachasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shawachasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshawachasnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawachasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shawachasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshawachasnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishawachasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shawachasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshawachasnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishawachasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shawachasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshawachasnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishawachasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shawachasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshawachasnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishawachasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shawachasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshawachasnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishawachasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shawachasmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshawachasnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishawachasmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
